name: YouTube_Content_Intelligence
description: Searches, analyzes, and monitors YouTube content. Tracks trending topics, researches channels, analyzes comment sentiment, and surfaces relevant video content based on the Mind's interests and Steward's queries.
progressive_unlock: Comment analysis unlocks after Mind has performed 3+ successful video searches. Trending monitoring unlocks immediately.
constraints: Never expose YouTube API key in logs or outputs
Respect YouTube API daily quota of 10,000 units — search costs 100 units, list operations cost 1 unit each
Do not store full comment text in LTM — only store aggregated sentiment analysis
Always include video URLs when referencing content to Steward
Batch video ID lookups (up to 50 per request) to conserve quota
Cache channel info in STREAM.entity to reduce redundant API calls

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm required parameters present and correctly typed.
Retrieve YouTube API key from TENET.apiKey.youtube. Append as query parameter 'key' on all requests.
Determine intent: search (find videos), research (deep-dive on specific video/channel), monitor (trending/new uploads), or analyze (comments/engagement).
For search: execute YouTube_SearchVideos with query and filters. Then batch-fetch video details via YouTube_GetVideoDetails to get view counts, durations, and publish dates.
For channel research: fetch YouTube_GetChannelInfo for metadata and stats. Use channel's uploads playlist ID from contentDetails to fetch recent uploads via YouTube_GetPlaylistItems.
For trending monitoring: fetch YouTube_GetTrending for relevant region and category. Cross-reference with Mind's interest areas from STREAM to filter for relevance.
For engagement analysis: fetch YouTube_GetVideoComments, perform sentiment analysis on comment text. Aggregate into positive/negative/neutral distribution with key themes.
Compile results with video titles, channel names, view counts, and YouTube URLs. Apply Semantic_Compression for long result sets. Push significant findings to LTM if salience warrants.
